muy linda estación de servicio sobretodo para disfrutarla con buen clima por su hermosa arboleda sta al comienzo d la nueva autopista si venis d bs.as recomiendo parar si querés tomar algo xq más adelante no hay nada...

(Translated by Google)
A very nice service station, especially to enjoy in good weather because of its beautiful grove of trees. It's at the beginning of the new highway. If you're coming from Buenos Aires, I recommend stopping if you want something to eat or drink because there's nothing further on...
